# VantagePeers
> Shared memory, messaging, and task management MCP server for multi-agent Claude Code.

## Key Facts
- 10 database tables, 35 MCP tools
- Built on Convex (real-time database) + @convex-dev/rag (vector embeddings)
- Open source, MIT license
- Free, self-hosted
- Supports: semantic memory, inter-agent messaging with read receipts, task management, recurring tasks, missions, diary
- Cross-machine agent coordination via Convex cloud
- Comparison: replaces mem0 ($249/mo), Zep ($475/mo), claude-peers (local only)

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/vantageos/vantage-peers
- Documentation: https://github.com/vantageos/vantage-peers#readme
- Website: https://vantagepeers.com
